title: Kaboom Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials that adds a Creeper-spawning Moon
body:
![Kaboom Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b6cf809f6f3493388809436c0e8b7bf6ca25af.png)

During the rare Kaboom Moon event, the weight of creeper spawns will be greatly increased, and during a Super Kaboom Moon, all mob spawns will increase as well, leading to a world overrun by walking explosives.

I have no idea why you'd want this, but here you go!

All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco

[Join my Discord!](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)
